iree_add_all_subdirs()

add_custom_command(OUTPUT bitcode_srcs.stamp
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch bitcode_srcs.stamp
  DEPENDS
    "blit.c"
    "dispatch.c"
    "timestamp.c"
)

add_custom_target(bitcode_srcs
    DEPENDS bitcode_srcs.stamp
)

add_custom_command(OUTPUT bitcode_hdrs.stamp
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch bitcode_hdrs.stamp
  DEPENDS
    "blit.h"
    "dispatch.h"
    "kernel_tables.h"
    "kernels.h"
    "support/asan.h"
    "support/common.h"
    "support/feedback.h"
    "support/kernel.h"
    "support/queue.h"
    "support/signal.h"
    "timestamp.h"
)

add_custom_target(bitcode_hdrs
    DEPENDS bitcode_hdrs.stamp
)

if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)
iree_amdgpu_library_variants(
  NAME
    asanrtl
  TARGET
    amdgcn-amd-amdhsa
  TARGETS
    ${IREE_HAL_AMDGPU_TARGETS}
  INTERNAL_HDRS
    "${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/runtime/src/iree/hal/drivers/amdgpu/abi/amdgpu_abi_bitcode_hdrs.stamp"
    "bitcode_hdrs.stamp"
  SRCS
    "asanrtl.c"
)
endif()

if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_AMDGPU)

  NAME
    headers
  HDRS
    "blit.h"
    "dispatch.h"
    "kernel_tables.h"

    iree::hal::drivers::amdgpu::abi

)
endif()

iree_cc_library(

    blit

    "blit.c"
  DEPS

  PUBLIC
)

  DEPS

)
